items.title: Big Tech's gigantic AI spending plans are spooking investors. But history shows that's when you want to buy
items.description: The recent pullback in megacaps could prove a buying opportunity so long as the companies' growth remains attractive.

items.title: Three software earnings reports this week could trigger a bounce, says Jay Woods
items.description: Investor and trader Jay Woods breaks down the week ahead for Pro subscribers.

items.title: Morgan Stanley says these two stocks will more than double as they pivot from bitcoin to data centers
items.description: A pair of bitcoin-linked firms could see their shares skyrocket, even as the flagship crypto retreats, due to their pivot to the data center business.

items.title: Fivespan brings amicable activism to Appian in a bid to lift the share price and build value
items.description: The activist firm prefers to take a "behind the scenes" approach when it works with a portfolio company.

items.title: Josh Brown's 'HALO' stocks: They can't be disrupted by AI and will get more profitable because of it
items.description: HALO stocks are heavy assets, low obsolescence. They have risks, but not AI risks. In fact, in many cases, AI will probably enable them to become even...
